# Summary

Explain the change in plain English.

## Why

Explain the problem this change solves.

## Files changed

List the important files.

## Testing

State exactly what was tested.

Do not claim tests that were not run.

## Safety review

- [ ] Original photos remain protected.
- [ ] Rename remains the default collision mode.
- [ ] Failures remain visible.
- [ ] No secrets, private photos, or logs were committed.
- [ ] Existing working behavior was preserved.
- [ ] Documentation was updated.

## Unknowns

List anything that remains unverified.

## Recovery

Explain how to reverse the change if it causes a problem.
